title: Vista Aeronautics Fix
description: You can now use Vista mod screens on vehicles from Create Aeronautics
body:
# WARNING!
# For correct operation, it is recommended to use Vista Aeronautics Fix 1.0.0 along with Vista 3.1.2, Create 6.0.9, Sable 1.0.6 and Create Aeronautics 1.0.2 or 1.0.3!

# **Vista Aeronautics Fix**
Vista Aeronautics Fix is a lightweight client-side addon designed to resolve rendering issues with Vista TVs when placed on moving contraptions from Create Aeronautics.

## **The Problem**
The original Vista mod uses an advanced optimization system (LOD and Plane Culling). When a TV is part of an active Aeronautics assembly (like an airship or a train), these systems often incorrectly determine that the screen is off-screen or too far away. This causes the display to flicker, disappear, or stop updating entirely while in motion.

### _Without the Fix_
![No Fix](https://files.catbox.moe/se5h9a.gif)

### _With the Fix_
![Fix](https://files.catbox.moe/03vhej.gif)

### **Features**
- Bypass Culling: Completely disables plane culling for TV screens, ensuring they remain visible at any angle on moving structures.
  
- LOD Overhaul: Removes aggressive distance-based optimizations that caused screens to turn off prematurely.
  
- Extended Render Distance: Increases the rendering bounding box and view distance to prevent the game from skipping TV rendering during high-speed travel.

#### **Technical Info**
Client-side only: This mod does not need to be installed on the server.

Requirements: Requires Vista and Moonlight Lib to be installed.
